title: Carrier's (CARR) Nlyte Boosts HVAC Segment With New Solution

title: Carrier Sponsors Habitat for Humanity's Carter Work Project
text: Home comfort system donations bring Carrier's total contributions to Habitat in 2023 to more than  $1.5 million PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. , Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, will once again participate in Habitat for Humanity's 37th Jimmy & Rosalynn Carter Work Project.

title: Delta CEO says carrier went 'too far' in SkyMiles changes, promises modifications after frequent flyer backlash
text: Delta's CEO said the carrier wanted to "rip the Band-Aid off" with changes to SkyMiles program.

title: Carrier Global Running Hot and Cold
text: Spin offs, breakups, and divestitures often make good investment opportunities as the smaller company becomes more focused on higher growth avenues and intelligent cost cutting. This appears to be the case for Carrier Global Corp ( CARR , Financial) after its spin-off from United Technologies Corporation in 2020.

title: CARR vs. KLAC: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the Electronics - Miscellaneous Products sector have probably already heard of Carrier Global (CARR) and KLA (KLAC). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts Refrigeration Segment With relayr Deal
text: Carrier (CARR) partners with relayr to offer Refrigeration-as-a-service to the food retail industry.

title: How Much Of A No-Brainer Is Carrier Global?
text: Carrier Global Corporation is undergoing a strategic transformation, focusing on energy management solutions with acquisitions like Viessmann, aiming for significant growth despite short-term heat pump challenges. Carrier is targeting substantial aftermarket sales growth, transitioning from $4.5 billion to $7 billion in the next five years. It also focuses on data center cooling growth. Despite a strong growth outlook and undervaluation, regulatory uncertainty regarding heat pump adoption remains a significant risk for Carrier's long-term performance.

title: Carrier's (CARR) Stonegate Deal to Boost Refrigeration Clientele
text: Carrier's (CARR) unit, Transicold, partners with Stonegate Farmers to deliver the latter with 15 Supra units connected to its Lynx Digital platform.

title: Kidde Taps into the Power of Music to Elevate Fire Safety Awareness with Its Cause For Alarm Campaign
text: Professional football player Kirk Cousins, National Parent Teacher Association (PTA) and Kidde team up to help educate families on fire safety preparedness MEBANE, N.C. , Sept. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Kidde – a trusted leader in fire safety for more than 100 years – announced its second annual Cause For Alarm TM campaign.

title: Here's Why Carrier Global (CARR) is a Strong Value Stock

title: Carrier Global: A Compounder In Heat Pumps And Climate Solutions
text: Carrier Global is divesting its Fire & Security and Commercial Refrigeration divisions to focus on Climate Solutions and Heat Pumps, which are expected to drive revenue growth. The acquisition of Viessmann Climate Solutions, a leading manufacturer of heat pumps in Europe, positions Carrier to capitalize on the growing heat pump market. Carrier's HVAC business has shown significant growth and has the highest operating margin among its business segments, contributing to overall group margin expansion.
